# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  name: instance-template
  properties:
    disks:
      - deviceName: boot-disk
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-9
    machineType: zones/$(zone)/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default
    scheduling:
      onHostMaintenance: MIGRATE
      automaticRestart: true

- type: deploymentmanager.v2beta.deployment
  name: instance-group-deployment
  properties:
    target:
      config:
        content: |
          resources:
          - type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
            name: instance-group-manager
            properties:
              baseInstanceName: gce-instance
              targetSize: 3
              instanceTemplate: $(ref.instance-template.selfLink)
              zone: $(zone)
    zone: us-central1-a
